title: Dreamtop Felt Christmas Tree - 3.28ft Felt Xmas Tree Set, Wall Hanging Velcro Christmas Tree with 32pcs Ornaments LED Lights Tree Banner Home Door Decoration
features: 【DIY Felt Christmas Tree Set】This diy christmas tree set includes 1 christmas tree, 30pcs led lights, 32pcs ornaments which have different colors and shapes: snowman, christmas candy, stars, bell, gift boxes and so on, and 1 long banner. You can get 35 products in total to meet your different need.

【Premium Material】This flat felt christmas tree is made of high quality felt fabric which is strong and durable, soft and lightweight. Felt tree looks shiny under the light, no harmful.You can hang the felt christmas tree to decorate the wall, the door, window, supermarket, dorm, classroom or bar.

【Easy to Use】We have improved the velcro so that you don’t have to worry about the decorations falling from the tree.This felt christmas tree have 32 magic stickers to ues.can stick the ornaments on the felt tree easily.

【Enjoy Fun of DIY】The felt xmas tree set is equipped with lovely ornaments that are full of Christmas elements, can decorate the Christmas tree according to their own ideas, this activity can develop hands-on skills, color recognition and creativity; together with handmade DIY decoration of the felt christmas tree, but also to enhance the relationship, creating a warm atmosphere.

【Folding Packaging】Christmas tree is shipped in folded packaging so velcro christmas tree may look folded or slightly uneven when you get felt christmas tree.But you can restory the shape of christmas felt tree by using an iron.
